steps.title: Visual Steps (in pattern images)
steps.instruction: Note: Steps 1-6 are in diagram images in the pattern PDF.

warnings.message: Note: Steps 1-6 are in diagram images in the pattern PDF.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.instruction: Gather: one 2-1/2” x 2-1/2” Fabric B square four Fabric B/Fabric I Flying Geese four 1-1/2” x 1-1/2” Fabric I squares
steps.clarifiedInstruction: Gather: one 2-1/2” x 2-1/2” Fabric B square four Fabric B/Fabric I Flying Geese four 1-1/2” x 1-1/2” Fabric I squares

steps.title: Step 8
steps.instruction: Arrange the pieces in five rows as shown. Sew the pieces together to form rows and press the seams of each row in opposite directions. Nest the seams and sew the row together. Press the seams open or to one side.
steps.clarifiedInstruction: Arrange the pieces in five rows as shown. Sew the pieces together to form rows and press the seams of each row in opposite directions. Nest the seams and sew the row together. Press the seams open or to one side.

steps.title: Step 9
steps.instruction: Add one 3-1/2” x 4-1/2” Fabric I rectangles to one side of the completed star. Make 5 additional Fabric B star units.
steps.clarifiedInstruction: Add one 3-1/2” x 4-1/2” Fabric I rectangles to one side of the completed star. Make 5 additional Fabric B star units.

steps.title: Step 10
steps.instruction: Repeat to make the following units:
steps.clarifiedInstruction: Repeat to make the following units:

steps.title: Step 11
steps.instruction: Gather the star units and arrange the pieced rows as shown. Add the Fabric I pieces as indicated. Fabrics B/I Make 6 Fabrics D/I Make 6 Fabrics E/I Make 4 Fabrics F/I Make 4 Fabrics G/I Make 4 7-1/2" x 10-1/2" 7-1/2" x 10-1/2" 7-1/2" x 3-1/2" 7-1/2" x 3-1/2" 7-1/2" x 14-1/2" 7-1/2" x 14-1/2"
steps.clarifiedInstruction: Gather the star units and arrange the pieced rows as shown. Add the Fabric I pieces as indicated. Fabrics B/I Make 6 Fabrics D/I Make 6 Fabrics E/I Make 4 Fabrics F/I Make 4 Fabrics G/I Make 4 7-1/2" x 10-1/2" 7-1/2" x 10-1/2" 7-1/2" x 3-1/2" 7-1/2" x 3-1/2" 7-1/2" x 14-1/2" 7-1/2" x 14-1/2"

steps.title: Step 12
steps.instruction: Sew the side Border A strips to the sides of the quilt center. Press toward the borders. Sew the top and bottom Border A strips to the quilt top. Press toward the borders.
steps.clarifiedInstruction: Sew the side Border A strips to the sides of the quilt center. Press toward the borders. Sew the top and bottom Border A strips to the quilt top. Press toward the borders.

steps.title: Step 13
steps.instruction: Sew the side Border B strips to the sides of the quilt top Press toward the borders. Sew the top and bottom Border B strips to the quilt top. Press toward the borders.
steps.clarifiedInstruction: Sew the side Border B strips to the sides of the quilt top Press toward the borders. Sew the top and bottom Border B strips to the quilt top. Press toward the borders.

steps.title: Step 15
steps.instruction: Sew the side Border C strips to the sides of the quilt top Press toward the borders. Sew the top and bottom Border C strips to the quilt top. Press toward the borders.
steps.clarifiedInstruction: Sew the side Border C strips to the sides of the quilt top Press toward the borders. Sew the top and bottom Border C strips to the quilt top. Press toward the borders.

steps.title: Step 16
steps.instruction: Sew the side Border D strips to the sides of the quilt top Press toward the borders. Sew the top and bottom Border D strips to the quilt top. Press toward the borders. Assemble the Quilt
steps.clarifiedInstruction: Sew the side Border D strips to the sides of the quilt top Press toward the borders. Sew the top and bottom Border D strips to the quilt top. Press toward the borders. Assemble the Quilt

steps.title: Step 14
steps.instruction: Sew the pieced side Borders to the sides of the quilt top Press toward the borders. Sew the top and bottom pieced Borders to the quilt top. Press toward the borders. This pattern may be used for personal purposes only and may not be reproduced in any form without the express permission from Robert Kaufman Fabrics. This pattern is not for resale.
